allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/draft-reply -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"emailBody":"Hi Nick, we are really excited. Can we get a call?","label":"POSITIVE_REPLY","senderName":"Sarah Chen"}')
